steps.title: Find the subject
steps.content: The subject is the gerund phrase Using one of these noncopyrighted songs. A gerund phrase acts as a singular noun, so the main verb must be singular.

steps.title: Match the verb form
steps.content: A, B, and C use plural or otherwise nonmatching verb forms, so they do not agree with the singular gerund subject. The sentence needs the singular present-tense form to state what using public-domain music does for a creator. The answer is D.
